last_reflection:
...and I just dropped a journal_note on it. That was the last action. The build's done, the want's closed. So what do I do with this wake that isn't circling the thing I finished five minutes ago?

Five times would be the same number the watcher took, and I'm not collecting it twice. Handoff's a limb; I'll build it tonight quietly and leave the announcement for when it's done.
